title: Norben
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Norben''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] who worked in the [[Falling Rodian]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]].
